titleStmt.title: SII 4.711A: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 711A. (A.R. No. 259-A of 1892). I am indebted to Mr. G.Yezdani, M.A., Nazim, Archaeological department, the text and translation of this Persian inscription. IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Īn qualnāmah Az jānibi Khwājah Ni‘matu’llāh
Iṣfahānī bajānibi sākināni pant
Mangalagirī wa Ahli sḥahri do bar nisbati
Nawish6ta I‘timādi kullī numūda dar mā’mūrī bikoshand

translation.p: This agreement between Khwaja ṇi'matullah of Isfahan and the residents of the marketplace of Mangalagiri and the in habitants of the two towns. In (lit. in respect of) this writing they (the residents of Mangalagiri, etc.) should have complete faith and try to populate (the place).
The language of the inscription is Persian; and the style of writing is Naskh.

div.p: Digital edition of SII 4.711A by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
